content:
NITROVAR™
Triple-Action Shield for Liver Vitality, Immune Strength, and Hangover

Young Broccoli Sprouts, Young Asparagus Sprouts, Antromax® Antrodia Cinnamomea, Turmacin® Turmeric Extract, Grape Seeds

What Is NitroVar?

NitroVar™ is a new and improved wellness supplement with a synergistic blend of clinically backed, natural ingredients. Harnessing the power of Young Broccoli Sprouts, Young Asparagus Sprouts, Grape Seeds, Antromax® Antrodia Cinnamomea & Turmacin® Turmeric Extract, this formula delivers unparalleled support for liver health, immune resilience, and rapid recovery from hangover fatigue.

Why Liver Needs Detoxification?

The liver plays an important role in metabolism, digestion, energy storage, and hormone production. It is also the major detoxifying organ in the body.

Over millions of years, our liver has evolved to metabolize toxins found in food and the environment. However, many of the substances taken in by the liver are exclusively fat-soluble, making them much harder for the liver to metabolize. These substances are deposited in our body as toxins. Accumulation of toxins can lead to your body feeling lethargic, lack of energy and falling sick easily. If you have these symptoms, liver detoxification is necessary.

There are two major detoxification pathways inside the liver cells, which are called the Phase I and Phase II detoxification pathways.

Phase I Liver Detoxification:

Phase I liver detoxification is the first line of defence against toxins. It consists of a group of enzymes known as the cytochrome P450 family. The enzymes help neutralize substances like alcohol and caffeine.

However, Phase I liver detoxification alone is still not enough to expel all the toxins. In addition, Phase I liver detoxification generates by-products which can still pose a toxic threat to the body. If the toxins are allowed to build up and stay in the liver, they can damage DNA and proteins. It is the role of Phase II liver detoxification, to make sure that those toxins do not build up.

Phase II Liver Detoxification:

Phase II liver detoxification neutralizes the by-products of Phase I liver detoxification and other remaining toxins. This is done by making the toxins water-soluble and can be excreted from the body. This process is called as conjugation. Glutathione, sulphate, and glycine are the primary molecules responsible for this process.

For efficient Phase II detoxification, the liver cells require sulphur-containing amino acids such as taurine and cysteine. The nutrients glycine, glutamine, choline and inositol are also required for efficient Phase II detoxification.

Advanced Liver Protection:

Your liver is your body's ultimate detox engine. NitroVar™ supercharges its natural processes:

1. Antromax® Antrodia Cinnamomea: Known as the Ruby Of the Forest in Taiwan, this rare medicinal mushroom is scientifically proven to enhance liver function, protect against oxidative stress, and promote cellular repair. Studies show it supports healthy enzyme levels and combats fatty liver buildup.

2. Turmacin® Turmeric Extract: A patented, bioavailable form of curcumin, Turmacin® reduces inflammation in the liver, aids toxin metabolism, and shields against damage from alcohol and pollutants.

3. Young Broccoli Sprout: Rich in sulforaphane, this powerhouse activates detoxification enzymes, flushing out harmful substances and supporting liver regeneration.

Immune Modulation for Year-Round Defense:

Antromax® : Balancing Immune Overactivity in Autoimmunity

1. Calms the Overreaction:
Antromax® acts like a "peacekeeper" for your immune system. It lowers the alarm signals (called cytokines) that tell your body to attack itself, which reduces inflammation and damage to your organs.

2. Balances the Immune System:
Antromax® promote Th1 responses (critical for fighting intracellular pathogens) while suppressing excessive Th2 activity (linked to allergies and autoimmunity), restoring immune balance. Antromax® maintain this balance so they stop fighting your own cells and focus on real threats.

3. Organ Protection in Lupus:
In SLE models, Antromax® significantly reduced urine protein levels and glomerular basement membrane thickening, protecting kidneys from immune complex deposition.

Turmacin®: Targeting Inflammation and Immune Dysregulation

1. Reduce Inflammation:
Turmacin® blocks a key inflammation switch in your body (called NF-kappa B). Imagine it like shutting off a fire alarm that's blaring for no reason—this stops unnecessary swelling and pain in joints, skin, or organs.

2. Clinical Efficacy in Rheumatoid Arthritis:
Turmacin® improves pain, joint mobility, and reduces inflammation.

3. Calms Overactive Immune System:
In autoimmune diseases, certain immune cells (T-cells) go rogue and attack healthy tissue. Turmacin maintains Th1/Th2 balance and inhibits autoreactive T-cell, so that they stop causing harm.

4. Powerful Antioxidant:
Turmacin® act like a cleanup crew, mopping up harmful free radicals that stress your cells and make inflammation worse.

Synergistic Benefits for Autoimmune Management:

1. Liver-Immune Axis Support: NitroVar™ enhance liver detoxification, which is extra important in autoimmune diseases (a clogged liver can make inflammation worse).

2. Reducing Oxidative Stress:
Antromax® boosts antioxidant enzymes, while Turmacin® neutralizes free radicals, lowering oxidative damage that exacerbates autoimmunity. Grape seed Extract is packed with oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), which neutralizes free radicals and reduces oxidative stress.

3. Boost Glutathione Production:
Young Asparagus Sprout is a natural source of glutathione precursors and antioxidants, it boosts immune cell efficiency and combats chronic inflammation.

Anti-Hangover Recovery:

Drinking may be soothing, but hangover is often discomforting, as the headaches, nauseousness, and lethargy that come afterwards are not only troublesome but also affect work performance and daily routines the next day.

Say goodbye to morning-after regrets. NitroVar™ accelerates alcohol metabolism and replenishes your body:

1. Antromax®: Enhances alcohol dehydrogenase (ADH) activity, accelerating alcohol metabolism and reducing oxidative stress.

2. Asparagus Sprout Extract: Clinically shown to increase alcohol dehydrogenase (ADH) activity, breaking down toxins faster and alleviating headaches, nausea, and fatigue.

3. Turmacin® + Grapeseed Extract: Combat alcohol-induced inflammation and oxidative damage, while rehydrating cells and restoring energy.

Who Needs NitroVar™?

1. People with liver disease like Hepatitis A, B, C and fatty liver disease (non-alcoholic or alcoholic)

2. Alcohol drinkers who want protect their liver and enjoy drinking without next-day hangover.

3. Immunocompromised individuals needing a natural immune modulator.

4. People who are feeling fatigued regularly needing a natural immune boost.

Product Information:

Ingredients: Young Broccoli Sprouts, Young Asparagus Sprouts, Antromax® Antrodia Cinnamomea, Turmacin® Turmeric Extract, Grape Seeds, Mixed Berries Juice Powder (Raspberry, Blueberry, Blackberry), Stevia.

Directions:
- General health maintenance: 1 sachet once daily after meal
- Liver detox: 1 sachet twice daily after meal
- Immune Modulation: 2 sachets twice daily after meal
- Hangover: 1 sachet 30 mins before alcohol ingestion, 1 sachet after alcohol ingestion

Mix the sachet with 125ml of water or juice (below 40°C)

No artificial flavoring, coloring or sweeteners. Vegen Formula.
